title: Disable problematic SELinux code causing runc issues
body: Temporarily disable some SELinux labelling code that was causing major runc issues

comments.body: LGTM, though I would like to see the issue number recorded in the code
This change went  in with #1524 which add mount to run.  Should we back that out, or perhaps back out the cli flag so it can't be called?
This change should be independent of the remainder of the mount flag code, which is why I'm only removing this part
